textByHash.833669ee365f417c731283e1c1a49f34c2cf27e2: Well seeing as you asked nicely... I could do with some help.
textByHash.522cb8ca9787e9f6caf547bf64c83bf2ed6bdedc: The wizard Grayzag next door decided he didn't like me so he enlisted an army of hundreds of imps.
textByHash.5b15e7b4a5a47d8d40d748751e4c39b0ef9864a7: These imps stole all sorts of my things. Most of these things I don't really care about, just eggs and balls of string and things.
textByHash.d99029925d6e9fa949dd741567d9152625e43eee: But they stole my four magical beads. There was a red one, a yellow one, a black one, and a white one.
textByHash.d18ad54cb244726ef0cd2dffb56ac23e73ed713e: These imps have now spread out all over the kingdom. Could you get my beads back for me?
textByHash.904d621302f2f03ab45bc623e8c943b637eebc4d: Are you saying that you stole my beads all this time and I've been blaming these imps!?
textByHash.86e36a0fb104da5217d4a93d742fdaecf4758cba: Well if you're not interested in the quests I have to give you, don't waste my time by asking me for them.
textByHash.ae3bf05aac49d8a310c4430919acab28318efcba: Or else what? You'll attack me?
textByHash.30e6176994752517b4531c4253f1c0d8848d4af2: Ah now you're assuming I have one to give.
textByHash.024192cab1a4d16ae92de2153c213d7594b406bd: So how are you doing finding my beads?
textByHash.afafa29b58a0dacd1b0839dd3cd85c24996aa9fd: Well get on with it. I've lost a white bead, a red bead, a black bead, and a yellow bead. Go kill some imps!
textByHash.0f4d388187406103c2c5f81355740a7be888690a: Come back when you have them all. The colour of the four beads that I need are red, yellow, black, and white. Go chase some imps!
textByHash.ca19caaa99a065c3e7f90218f72b7e262645329c: Give them here and I'll check that they really are MY beads, before I give you your reward. You'll like it, it's an amulet of accuracy.
textByHash.b8ded84b7f11f99f496a83653a2daa8061d81bf0: No, everything is good with the world today.
textByHash.f9d1c4fcbb6be09f0f70c89a077a031b26be35de: I don't think so, the type of magic I study involves years of meditation and research.
textByHash.76efa23f1066f5ef9b8fea568fc4ff6ee9ce79f0: I have a few spare. I'd like one of each coloured bead again in return, though! Black, white, yellow and red.
textByHash.f73e023f0f841e247766e75f286829891bb6df4a: You don't want to know. Take care!
